prompt: Using the provided reference image, keep the cafe photo composition, lighting, food, cup, plate, table, and background unchanged, and turn it into an emotive social-media style annotated photo by overlaying handwritten white Japanese copy directly on the image. Add 1 main headline in the upper left with an underline and small accent marks: 「朝のごほうび」. Beneath it, add 1 short subcopy block in 2 lines: 「焼きたての香りで / 今日がはじまる。」. Then add 6 handwritten callout notes with sketchy arrows pointing to details in the scene: 1) 「バターの香り、ふわり…」 pointing to the croissant, 2) 「先端まできれい」 pointing to the left tip of the croissant, 3) 「表面の照りがたまらない〜」 pointing to the glossy top surface, 4) 「さくっと軽い層」 pointing to the upper right area of the croissant, 5) 「この立体感が好き」 near the plate edge, 6) 「やさしい一口」 pointing to the cup. Add 1 closing handwritten sentence near the lower right: 「なんでもない朝が、少し好きになる。♡」. Make all typography look like casual marker or chalk-pen handwriting with thin uneven strokes, soft organic spacing, doodled underlines, arrows, and small decorative marks. Keep the text integrated naturally into the empty wall and tabletop spaces, with a warm minimal Japanese lifestyle ad / UGC feel.
